name: ovndb
description: High-performance embedded NoSQL database for Node.js — on-disk B+ Tree, multi-segment storage, MVCC, aggregation pipeline, zero dependencies

scripts.test: cross-env OVNDB_LOG=silent node --import tsx/esm --test test/unit/crc32.test.ts test/unit/lru-cache.test.ts test/unit/filter.test.ts test/unit/schema-validator.test.ts test/unit/aggregation.test.ts test/unit/crypto-layer.test.ts test/unit/mvcc.test.ts test/unit/id-generator.test.ts test/unit/relation-manager.test.ts test/integration/collection.test.ts test/integration/transaction.test.ts test/security/security.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: cross-env OVNDB_LOG=silent node --import tsx/esm --test test/unit/crc32.test.ts test/unit/lru-cache.test.ts test/unit/filter.test.ts test/unit/schema-validator.test.ts test/unit/aggregation.test.ts test/unit/crypto-layer.test.ts test/unit/mvcc.test.ts test/unit/id-generator.test.ts test/unit/relation-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: cross-env OVNDB_LOG=silent node --import tsx/esm --test test/integration/collection.test.ts test/integration/transaction.test.ts
scripts.bench: cross-env OVNDB_LOG=silent BENCH_N=10000 node --import tsx/esm test/benchmark/throughput.benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:50k: cross-env OVNDB_LOG=silent BENCH_N=50000 node --import tsx/esm test/benchmark/throughput.benchmark.ts
scripts.stress: cross-env OVNDB_LOG=silent STRESS_N=10000000 node --import tsx/esm examples/stress-test-10m.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
